message:
fix: extract Zig shared utils, fix findMatchingBrace bug, fix multi-edge routes

Zig:
- Create wasm/src/util.zig with shared JSON helpers (copySlice, writeInt,
  findMatchingBrace, extractStringField, extractIntField, extractNestedStringField)
- Fix findMatchingBrace in layout.zig, arrows.zig, validate.zig — naive version
  broke on '}' inside quoted strings; now all use svg.zig's string-aware version
- Remove ~300 lines of duplicated code across 4 Zig files

TypeScript:
- Fix multi-edge route key collision — multiple edges between same node pair
  now get unique keys (A->B, A->B#1, etc.) instead of silently overwriting
